name: Kareem42
html: Kareem42
css: .k42-wrap{position:relative;width:100%;height:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;background:#0d0d1a;}.k42-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 60%,#1a0a3a 0%,#0d0d1a 70%);animation:k42-pulse 4s ease-in-out infinite;}.@keyframes k42-pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.7;}}.k42-text{position:relative;display:flex;align-items:baseline;gap:0.05em;font-family:Georgia,serif;font-size:clamp(2rem,8vw,3.5rem);font-weight:bold;}.k42-letter{display:inline-block;color:transparent;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#a78bfa,#60a5fa,#f472b6);-webkit-background-clip:text;background-clip:text;animation:k42-wave 2s ease-in-out infinite;animation-delay:calc(var(--i)*0.15s);text-shadow:none;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px #a78bfa88);}.@keyframes k42-wave{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-18%);}}.k42-num{display:inline-block;margin-left:0.15em;font-size:0.7em;color:#60a5fa;text-shadow:0 0 12px #60a5fa,0 0 24px #60a5fa88;animation:k42-glow 2s ease-in-out infinite alternate;}.@keyframes k42-glow{from{text-shadow:0 0 8px #60a5fa,0 0 16px #60a5fa88;}to{text-shadow:0 0 20px #60a5fa,0 0 40px #a78bfa,0 0 60px #f472b688;}}
